title: Customization issues with embedded workday forms
excerpt: When creating a form in Monday to embed within our site, there is no way to update the branding colors to match our site. I am already paying for this functionality and a simple color customization should be available…

posts.author: carballeyra (Dave Carballeyra)
posts.cookedHtml:
IMG-20240503-WA00041410×458 83.6 KB

When creating a form in Monday to embed within our site, there is no way to update the branding colors to match our site. I am already paying for this functionality and a simple color customization should be available.

Even if you have to update the embedded code directly, but the iframe code is extremely limited.

How can I leverage the ease of use in populating our CRM without having to incorporate other 3rd party solutions to get around this very basic limitation.
